_comment: Match rules for the ap_bill entity type.
AP bills have a system-assigned numeric primary key (bill_id) that is
stable and unique within an Intacct company.  With a single source,
deterministic exact matching on bill_id is sufficient.
Blocking: RECORD_ID_PREFIX on bill_id groups records by the first 8
chars of the ID, keeping block sizes manageable.
When a second AP source is integrated (e.g. Sage X3 PORDER), add a
probabilistic rule matching on vendor_id + bill_date + bill_amount.
No changes to survivorship_v1.json or code required.

blocking._comment: Partition by first 8 chars of bill_id.

rules._comment: Rule 1 — Deterministic: identical bill_id = same bill.
